Details

*How did you hear about this opportunity?
*At Edgility, we keep diversity, equity and inclusion at the core of our work. We believe that a rich variety of networks, perspectives and abilities help us all to do our best work. In large part, our work around DEI is the ongoing collection and analysis of the demographics of our networks and candidate pools, which helps us ensure that we are reaching out to diverse connectors and candidates. It is optional to self-identify and will have no influence on your candidacy. How do you identify racially/ethnically?
*What is your gender?
*Do you identify as LGBTQIA2+?
*Do you identify as a first generation college student?
*Are you authorized to work in the United States?
*Have you secured from SEAs, universities, and/or LEAs?
